since_last: 40% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.05%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.79% · BTC +0.30% · Gold -0.83% · Nasdaq100 +1.68%. 40% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.05%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.05%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.25%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +8.96%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +8.96%, SPCX +2.03%, PLTR +1.81%, MSFT +1.39%, ORCL +1.24%. Laggards: MU -3.14%, MRVL -2.42%, CRNC -2.39%, CEVA -2.16%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.03% at $174.33
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.03% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
